headline: How The Colgate Palmolive (CL) Narrative Is Shifting With 2030 Plan And 2026 Outlook
summary: Colgate Palmolive’s modeled fair value was nudged from about US$96.68 to roughly US$97.21, a shift of less than 1% that still catches the eye when you track target moves closely. That tweak sits alongside a flurry of Street research, with some analysts pushing targets into the US$93 to US$105 range, while others trim back toward levels like US$86 as they weigh the company’s 2030 plan against sector headwinds. As you read on, you will see how to follow this evolving narrative and what these...
